title: Aksalustration, an illustration for conversational AI platform
description: Aksalustration, an illustration pack for Kata.ai, seamlessly blends traditional Indonesian puppetry with modern art, enhancing brand awareness and visual appeal.
impact: This project significantly reduces the workload for the marketing team in crafting illustrations while simultaneously enhancing brand identity awareness

",i(a.p,{children:["When I joined ",n(a.a,{href:"http://kata.ai/",children:"kata.ai"})," in 2019, my first task and challenge was determining how to create illustrations for a conversational AI company."]}),"

It can be easily pronounced in any language and reflects our identity as an Indonesian company.']})}),"

",n(a.p,{children:"Wayang Beber is a puppet art that emerged and developed in Java in pre-Islamic times and is still growing in some areas of Java. Wayang Beber emerged and developed on the island of Java during the Majapahit kingdom. The pictures of the puppet characters were painted on a piece of cloth and paper. It was then arranged in sequence according to the scene of the story."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Our illustrations incorporate traditional styles with modern touches to make a lasting impression. This can be seen in the head and nose, which are inspired by Wayang Beber's forms and characteristics. ",i("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mt-6 mb-6",children:[i("div",{children:[n("img",{src:"/illus/Group_35.png"}),n("p",{children:"Wayang beber head figure"})]}),i("div",{children:[n("img",{src:"/illus/Group_42.png"}),n("p",{children:"Aksalustration head figure"})]})]}),"

title: Taxi consent dispatch
description: The Taxi Consent Dispatch project addressed the challenge of ensuring a reliable and user-friendly transportation experience during high-demand traffic, significantly improving the user acceptance rate and trust in Gojek's services.
